_comment: Local copy of agents/shared/prices.json bundled into the orchestration agent container at build time. Source of truth lives in agents/shared/prices.json (see agents/shared/prices.py for documentation). Both copies must be updated together when AWS pricing changes (Requirements 14.2 and 17.2). The capture-cost figure shown in the Orchestration Agent's Capture_Confirmation_Prompt and the README cost-estimate table both read these values, so keeping a single source of truth prevents drift.
